arts.ttl: Michael Stewart makes Cameron Carter-Vickers starting claim ahead of Celtic against Atalanta
arts.sum: Michael Stewart backs Cameron Carter-Vickers to start for Celtic against Atalanta One thing that needs to be noted is that Cameron Carter-Vickers, the club’s best defender, has been sidelined since September and he missed that Dortmund game, so that doesn’t help anyone’s cause.

arts.ttl: Brendan Rodgers fires back at Celtic snipers as boss demands more 'leeway' over Champions League cash gulf
arts.sum: The Scottish champions are aiming to recover from the 7-1 hammering at the hands of Borussia Dortmund against Atalanta

arts.ttl: Gasperini confident ahead of Atalanta’s Champions League clash with Celtic
arts.sum: Atalanta manager Gian Piero Gasperini addressed the media ahead of his team’s crucial Champions League match against Celtic. The Italian coach expressed optimism about his side’s recent form and their approach to the game (as quoted by TMW). Gasperini began by highlighting the importance of the match: “Our last two victories have given a boost to our league position, but this is a different competition. Points start to become more crucial in the third round, and we already have the opportunity to consolidate a better position in the Champions League as well.” When asked about the nature of the upcoming The post Gasperini confident ahead of Atalanta’s Champions League clash with Celtic appeared first on FootItalia.com.

arts.ttl: Cameron Carter-Vickers OUT of Celtic's clash with Atalanta as defender fails to travel for Champions League showdown
arts.sum: The defender has been sidelined for over a month with Auston Trusty filling the void

arts.ttl: Ross McCormack's view on Aberdeen challenging Celtic is not good news for Rangers
arts.sum: There is a view, however, that Aberdeen have it in them to at least finish second and when asked if they could win the league, former Rangers midfielder Ross McCormack delivered a verdict that is not good news for the Ibrox club. “So it makes no difference to them now whether they’re going to be playing Celtic or Rangers or anyone else, they now believe that they can go win the game.

arts.ttl: Chris Sutton responds to 'really interesting question' about Celtic and Aberdeen title race
arts.sum: Smith asked: “Chris, can you see enough of the other teams taking points off Celtic for Aberdeen to have a pathway to the title?” As of this moment, and it’s still early doors, they are in a title race, but knowing this Celtic team, they can blow anyone out of the water in next to no time.

In the evening match on Saturday, Juventus secured three points against Lazio thanks to an own goal by Gila in the dying moments of the game, marking their return to victory at the Stadium two months after their last win. The visitors secured their third consecutive draw in the league and their sixth in eight matches, matching the club`s record set in the 1989/90 season.

arts.ttl: Champions League | Atalanta v Celtic: Match Preview
arts.sum: As the Champions League group stage reaches its midway point, Atalanta and Celtic prepare to face off in a crucial matchup at the Gewiss Stadium on Wednesday. Both teams enter the contest with contrasting fortunes in their European campaigns so far, setting the stage for an intriguing battle in Bergamo. Gian Piero Gasperini’s Atalanta side has made a strong start to their Champions League campaign, collecting four points from their opening two matches. arts.ttl: I starred under Gasperini and he plays sexy football but Atalanta aren't invincible and Celtic must have no fear
arts.sum: Massimo Donati - who played for both clubs during his playing career - has given his views ahead of the big clash in Bergamo

arts.ttl: Latest Atalanta team news for Celtic clash in Champions League
arts.sum: Atalanta defender Sead Kolasinac was not seen on the pitch on Tuesday, so he’s unlikely...
